name: Ted's Bakery
tagline: North Shore legend famous for haupia chocolate cream pie — the plate lunches fuel surfers year-round.
mustOrder: Haupia chocolate cream pie — the iconic pie, chocolate and coconut pudding layers
Garlic shrimp plate — North Shore style, served with rice
Kalua pork plate lunch — smoky, tender, with mac salad and rice
parking: Small parking lot right in front on Kamehameha Hwy. Usually can find a spot except peak surf season weekends.
talkStory: Ted's has been a North Shore institution since 1987. The haupia pie is so famous they ship it to the mainland. Every surfer, every local, every North Shore visitor ends up here at some point. The plate lunches are big, cheap, and perfect after a morning at Pipeline or Sunset. Get the pie to go for the beach — haupia pie on the sand watching the sunset is peak North Shore living. They open early so it's a solid breakfast stop too.
